context.document_title: Die Reise zu den Grenzen des Bewusstseins und zurück
context.description: German book front matter with the title "Die Reise zu den Grenzen des Bewusstseins und zurück" and a preface. The author apologizes for a dense, reflective writing style and frames the book as a short account of experiences from a long, unusual journey.
normalization_notes: Classified as front matter because the visible section is a preface.

fields.work_title: Die Reise zu den Grenzen des Bewusstseins und zurück

rows.heading_text: Die Reise zu den Grenzen des Bewusstseins und zurück
rows.text_content: Die Reise zu den Grenzen des Bewusstseins und zurück

rows.paragraph_text: The author says a preface should attract readers but instead begins with an apology for a dense, convoluted style and the audio version. The book is presented as a compromise between perfectionism and laziness, shaped into a short account of experiences from decades of a strange journey.

content.free_text: book_page front_matter other Book title: Die Reise zu den Grenzen des Bewusstseins und zurück. Preface introducing a reflective, apologetic account of a long strange journey and a dense writing style.
